title: Field Definition Sets
description: Manage field definitions for AI document extraction

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this field definition set? This action cannot be undone.
messages.deleteFailed: Failed to delete field definition set
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save field definition set
messages.duplicateScope: A field definition set already exists for this scope
messages.duplicateScopeHint: Each scope (Global / Company / Format) can only have one active definition set. Please edit the existing one or choose a different scope.

form.name: Name
form.scopeDescription: Determines which documents this field set applies to
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this field definition set
form.fieldsDescription: Select and configure the fields that AI should extract from documents

fieldEntry.label: Label
fieldEntry.extractionHintsPlaceholder: Instructions for AI on how to find this field

coverage.title: Field Coverage Analysis
coverage.description: Analysis based on extraction feedback data
coverage.missingDescription: Defined fields not found during extraction
coverage.unexpectedDescription: Fields found that are not in the definition

suggestion.addField: Consider adding this frequently found field
suggestion.removeField: This field is rarely found — consider removing or marking optional
suggestion.makeOptional: This field has low coverage — consider making it optional

validation.companyRequired: Company is required for this scope
validation.formatRequired: Document format is required for FORMAT scope
validation.fieldsRequired: At least one field is required
validation.fieldKeyFormat: Field key must be snake_case format
